title: Riverside Consulting: Website Redesign

sections.title: Overview
sections.content:
This proposal outlines a complete website redesign for Riverside Consulting, focusing on modern design, mobile responsiveness, and improved user experience.

The new website will better represent your brand and convert visitors into clients.

sections.title: Scope of Work
sections.content:
5-page responsive website (Home, About, Services, Contact, Blog)
Mobile-first design approach
SEO optimization for all pages
Contact form with email integration
Google Analytics setup
2 rounds of revisions included

sections.title: Deliverables
sections.content:
Fully responsive website
Admin access for content updates
Basic SEO setup
Training session (30 min)

investment.description: 5-page responsive site with all features listed above

startDate: Next business day after starting payment is received
